question: Is the general environment (baggage claim, carousel, ceiling lights) rendered in a realistic photography style?
Does the realistic environment include a marble floor with reflections and a blurred crowd in the background?
Is the traveler rendered in a cel-shaded anime style (flat colors, bold outlines)?
Is the anime traveler depicted leaning forward and reaching over a realistic metal railing?
Is the suitcase rendered in a low-poly 3D style with visible hard-edged geometric facets?
Is the astronaut figurine rendered in a claymation stop-motion style (soft, moldable appearance)?
Is roughly half of the astronaut figurine's body occluded by the suitcase's low-poly telescopic handle?
Is the overhead flight information display rendered in a glitched ASCII or terminal character style?
Is one corner of the ASCII flight display blocked by a distant real concrete pillar?
Is there a glass partition visible on the right side of the frame containing a reflection of the traveler?
Is the reflection of the traveler in the glass partition rendered in the same cel-shaded anime style?
Is the stylized reflection correctly perspective-aligned with the traveler?
Do the multiple distinct styles (photorealism, anime, low-poly, claymation, ASCII) coexist clearly without blending into a single uniform style?
